levels.desc: ChatGPT launch — broad general capability across knowledge domains
levels.name: Conversational AGI

levels.desc: o1/o3, DeepSeek-R1 — chain of thought, multi-step problem solving
levels.name: Reasoning AGI

levels.desc: Claude Code, Codex — autonomous task completion with tool use
levels.name: Agentic AGI

levels.desc: Multi-agent systems coordinating work across domains
levels.name: Collaborative AGI

levels.desc: Self-directed systems that can identify and pursue goals independently
levels.name: Autonomous AGI

summary: Position: AGI was functionally achieved with ChatGPT in November 2022. Since then we have been climbing capability levels. The question is no longer "if AGI" but "what level of AGI and how fast."

Argues AGI requires fundamental breakthroughs in reasoning, reliability, and genuine understanding. Current models are sophisticated pattern matchers that fail on novel situations. Consistent critic of AGI hype.

levels.desc: AI that can turn $100,000 into $1,000,000 autonomously by researching and executing a retail business
levels.name: Modern Turing Test

summary: Proposed a practical economic test rather than conversational imitation. Focuses on real-world capability and autonomous decision-making.
Defined AGI as "a machine that can do any intellectual task that a human being can." Co-coined the term "Artificial General Intelligence." Has predicted 50% chance of AGI by 2028.

Argues current LLMs cannot achieve AGI because they lack world models, persistent memory, and genuine planning. Token prediction is insufficient. Cofounded AMI Labs in 2026 with $1B+ to pursue his approach.

levels.desc: No meaningful catastrophic risk
levels.name: ASL-1

levels.desc: Present-day risks, requires current safeguards
levels.name: ASL-2

levels.desc: Substantially increased risk, enhanced containment needed
levels.name: ASL-3

levels.desc: Potentially catastrophic autonomous capabilities
levels.name: ASL-4+

summary: Safety-focused framework tied to deployment policy. Current models operate at ASL-2. ASL-3 would require bio/cyber risk mitigation before deployment.

levels.desc: Narrow non-AI tools
levels.name: No AI

levels.desc: Equal to or somewhat better than unskilled human
levels.name: Emerging

levels.desc: At least 50th percentile of skilled adults
levels.name: Competent

levels.desc: At least 90th percentile of skilled adults
levels.name: Expert

levels.desc: At least 99th percentile of skilled adults
levels.name: Virtuoso

levels.desc: Outperforms 100% of humans
levels.name: Superhuman

summary: Six performance levels crossed with breadth (narrow vs general). Published Nov 2023. Defines AGI as general-purpose AI at Level 3+ (Expert).

levels.desc: Conversational AI with natural language
levels.name: Chatbots

levels.desc: Human-level problem solving
levels.name: Reasoners

levels.desc: Systems that can take actions in the world
levels.name: Agents

levels.desc: AI that aids in scientific invention
levels.name: Innovators

levels.desc: AI that can do the work of an entire organisation
levels.name: Organisations

summary: Internal framework leaked July 2024. OpenAI claimed Level 2 reached with o1. Level 3 (agents) is the current frontier as of early 2026.
